'''Galactic Exotics''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]-run company located in the city of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] that cultivated exotic plants on other [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. The company also developed [[shalaman]] and [[podon]] orchards on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] around [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]]. Their products also included edible fungus.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
